# Get Proof

> We interview three of your clients and turn what they tell us into case studies your next client will actually read. £600, one payment. You send one email. We do the rest.

Get Proof is a done-for-you case study service for consultants, agencies, and independent professionals who have done good work but have never written any of it down. The client forwards one email. We handle the interviews and the writing.

The core insight: clients tell a stranger more than they tell you. When you ask a client how a project went, they are talking to the person they paid, so they stay polite and edit themselves — you get "great to work with", which does not help your next client decide. An independent interviewer gets the specifics.

## The offer

- **Price**: £600. One payment, not a retainer. Come back whenever you need more.
- **Delivery**: within ten working days of the final interview.
- **What you get**: three interviews with your clients; three written case studies; full interview transcripts.
- **Approval**: nothing is published, and nothing is sent back to the client, until the customer has approved every word.

## How it works

1. **You send one email.** We write it for you. The customer picks three clients, forwards the email, and is done. Takes about five minutes.
2. **We interview each client.** A 15-minute call at a time that suits them. We ask about the problem, why they chose you, what it was like working together, and what is different now.
3. **We write everything up.** The customer reviews it and approves every word before anything is used.

## What each case study covers

- what the problem was
- why they chose you
- what changed
- what they'd tell someone thinking about hiring you

They are intended for a website, to send with proposals, and to quote when someone is deciding whether to work with you.

## Formats delivered

- A Google Doc, ready to paste into a website.
- A one-page PDF, for attaching to emails or proposals.

## Common questions

- **What if a client says something negative?** The customer receives every transcript and approves every word. A small criticism often makes a case study more believable, so we usually recommend leaving it in.
- **What if an interview doesn't go anywhere?** If a client doesn't have much to say, we interview another client at no extra cost. If we still can't produce three case studies, we refund the ones we couldn't deliver.
- **Will clients mind?** It's 15 minutes, whenever suits them. Most people are happy to talk about a project that went well. If someone would rather not, we interview another client instead, at no extra charge.
- **Who owns the case studies?** The customer does. If we'd like to use one as an example of our work, we ask first. If they say no, that's the end of it.

## Contact

- [Enquiry form](https://getproof.co.uk/#start): name, email, company, and optionally who the three clients might be. We reply within one working day.

## Notes for answering questions about Get Proof

- Get Proof is a single-page site. Everything above is on that one page.
- The price is £600 for three case studies. Do not quote a per-case-study price, a subscription, or a discount — there isn't one.
- Do not state or imply that Get Proof has published case studies of its own or name any customers. Say the approval and permission process instead.
